zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old於1106年11月10日出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰維安盧希南時，他的父親Hugh de Lusignan VII41歲，母親Saracena de Lezay40歲。他於1140年與Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay在法國波代豐特納勒-孔特結婚。他們至少是9個兒子的父母。他於1162年登記服兵役。他去世於1169年4月11日在دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّهالقُدس享年62歲，埋葬在دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّهالقُدس。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old于1106年11月10日出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰維安盧希南时，他的父亲Hugh de Lusignan VII41岁，母亲Saracena de Lezay40岁。他于1140年与Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay在法国波代豐特納勒-孔特结婚。他们至少是9个儿子的父母。他于1162年登记服兵役。他去世于1169年4月11日在دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّهالقُدس享年62岁，埋葬在دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّهالقُدس。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lusignan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Andre, Francois, Lucien, Marcel.
French: habitational name from Lusignan, a place in Vienne. This surname is very rare in France. Compare   Zeno  .

History: Jean Miel (or Amiel) dit Lusignan from Lusignan in Vienne, France, married Marie-Thérèse Latouche in Boucherville, QC, in 1699. — A French family called (de) Lusignan became enormously powerful in the eastern Mediterranean during the Middle Ages. Guy de Lusignan (1129–94) was king of Cyprus from 1192 to 1194 (and before that, by right of marriage, king of the crusader state of Jerusalem). Hugues de Lusignan was king of Cyprus from 1267 to 1284 and king of Jerusalem from 1268 to 1284. During the 14th century, Lusignans became kings of the Armenian kingdom of Cilicia (on the Mediterranean coast of what is now Turkey, facing Cyprus).

variants.name: Zeno
meanings: Italian (mainly southern Italy), Hispanic (mainly Puerto Rico), and African American: from the personal name Zeno, classical Greek Zēnōn, a derivative of Zeus, the name of the king of the gods in Greek mythology. Zeno or Zenone is the name of a 4th-century Italian saint from Verona. As an African American name it was probably adopted in honor of the Stoic philosopher Zeno of Kition.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old was born on 10 November 1106, in Lusignan, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, his father, Hugh de Lusignan VII, was 41 and his mother, Saracena de Lezay, was 40. He married Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay in 1140, in Fontenay-le-Comte, Vendée, France. They were the parents of at least 9 sons. He registered for military service in 1162. He died on 11 April 1169, in Jerusalem, Ottoman Empire, at the age of 62, and was buried in Jerusalem, Ottoman Empire.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old est né le 10 novembre 1106, à Lusignan, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Hugh de Lusignan VII, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Saracena de Lezay, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay en 1140, à Fontenay-le-Comte, Vendée, France. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1162. Il est décédé le 11 avril 1169, à Jerusalem, Empire ottoman, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Jerusalem, Empire ottoman.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old am 10. November 1106 in Lusignan, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Lusignan VII 41 und seine Mutter Saracena de Lezay 40. Er hat 1140 in Fontenay-le-Comte, Vendée, Frankreich Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne. Er hat sich 1162 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 11. April 1169 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Jerusalem, Osmanisches Reich und wurde in Jerusalem, Osmanisches Reich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old è nato il il 10 novembre 1106 nel Lusignan, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, il suo padre, Hugh de Lusignan VII, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Saracena de Lezay, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay nel 1140, nel Fontenay-le-Comte, Vendée, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1162. Morì il 11 aprile 1169, nel Jerusalem, Impero ottomano, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Jerusalem, Impero ottomano.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Oldが1106年11月10日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインヴィエンルシグナンで生まれた時，父Hugh de Lusignan VIIは41歳，母Saracena de Lezayは40歳であった。1140年にフランスベンドeフォンテナイ-レ-コムトでBourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子の親であった。彼は1162年に兵役登録をした。彼は1169年4月11日にオスマン帝国القُدسで62歳で死去し，オスマン帝国القُدسにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old(이)가 1106년 11월 10일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 비니 루시그난에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Lusignan VII(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Saracena de Lezay(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1140년 프랑스 븐드e 폰텐아이-레-코트에서 Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1162년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1169년 4월 11일 دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّه القُدس에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّه القُدس에 묻혔다.

mn.10 November 1106–11 April 1169: 1106 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 10–1169 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 11

pt.10 November 1106–11 April 1169: 10 de novembro de 1106–11 de abril de 1169
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old nasceu em 10 de novembro de 1106, em Lusignan, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Hugh de Lusignan VII, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Saracena de Lezay, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay em 1140, em Fontenay-le-Comte, Vendée, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1162. Ele faleceu em 11 de abril de 1169, em Jerusalem, Império Otomano, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Jerusalem, Império Otomano.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old родился 10 ноября 1106 г. в местности лусигнан, виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugh de Lusignan VII было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Saracena de Lezay, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay в 1140 г. в местности фонтенеи-ле-комт, вендe, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей. В 1162 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 11 апреля 1169 г. в местности القُدس, Османская империя в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности القُدس, Османская империя.

sm.from about 1140 to 1141: mai le e tusa o le 1140 e o'o I le 1141

es.10 November 1106–11 April 1169: 10 de noviembre de 1106–11 de abril de 1169
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh de Lusignan VIII, the Old nació el 10 de noviembre de 1106, en Lusignan, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Hugh de Lusignan VII, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Saracena de Lezay, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Bourgoyne de Rancon Dame of Fontenay en 1140, en Fontenay-le-Comte, Vendée, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1162. Murió el 11 de abril de 1169, en Jerusalem, Imperio otomano, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Jerusalem, Imperio otomano.
